---
id: mcp-server-endpoint
title: "MCP server endpoint"
description: "Streamable HTTP endpoint for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. Accepts JSON-RPC messages to interact with Datadata tools including datasources, data spaces, queries, and AI memory."
sidebar_label: "MCP server endpoint"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/openapi/datadata-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"MCP server endpoint"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/mcp/v1"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Streamable HTTP endpoint for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. Accepts JSON-RPC messages to interact with Datadata tools including datasources, data spaces, queries, and AI memory.
